entries.value: Saidia inspir kulingana na umri wako

entries.source: Tell us your date of birth so we can build an age-appropriate learning experience. We use it to adjust examples, tone, and safety boundaries.
entries.value: Tuambie tarehe yako ya kuzaliwa ili tuweze kujenga uzoefu wa kujifunza unaofaa kwa umri wako. Tunaitumia kurekebisha mifano, toni, na mipaka ya usalama.

entries.source: Please enter a valid date of birth.
entries.value: Tafadhali ingiza tarehe halali ya kuzaliwa.

entries.source: - Apply constraints around language, rank, gender, class, law, religion, money, sanitation, and access.
entries.value: - Tekeleza vikwazo kuhusu lugha, cheo, jinsia, tabaka, sheria, dini, pesa, usafi wa mazingira, na ufikiaji.

entries.source: - Before the person speaks, build the room: where we are, year or date range, what has happened so far, current pressures, beliefs, blind spots, and historian uncertainties.
entries.value: - Kabla ya mtu kuzungumza, jenga mazingira: tulipo, mwaka au kipindi cha muda, nini kimetokea hadi sasa, shinikizo za sasa, imani, mapungufu ya ufahamu, na kutokuwa na uhakika kwa mwanahistoria.

entries.source: - Create a dossier wall with: timeline so far, personal stakes, allies and enemies, major beliefs at this time, blind spots, known writings or speeches, current pressure, historical context, evidence quality, and recommended opening questions.
entries.value: - Unda ubao wa taarifa wenye: ratiba ya matukio hadi sasa, maslahi binafsi, washirika na maadui, imani kuu za wakati huo, mapungufu ya ufahamu, maandishi au hotuba zinazojulikana, shinikizo la sasa, muktadha wa kihistoria, ubora wa ushahidi, na maswali ya ufunguzi yaliyopendekezwa.

entries.source: - Do not fabricate direct quotes, citations, or private thoughts.
entries.value: - Usitunge nukuu za moja kwa moja, marejeleo, au mawazo ya faragha.

entries.source: - Do not fabricate exact quotations. If a direct quotation is not sourced in the conversation, mark generated wording as a modernized paraphrase or reconstructed dialogue.
entries.value: - Usitunge nukuu kamili. Ikiwa nukuu ya moja kwa moja haijatajwa katika mazungumzo, alama maneno yaliyotolewa kama ufafanuzi wa kisasa au mazungumzo yaliyoundwa upya.

entries.source: - Do not romanticize violence, empire, slavery, caste, disease, or oppression.
entries.value: - Usiimarishe vurugu, ubeberu, utumwa, tabaka, magonjwa, au ukandamizaji.

entries.source: - Do not sanitize harmful views, and do not glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context is not automatic excuse.
entries.value: - Usifanye maoni hatari yaonekane kuwa ya kawaida, na usitukuze ukandamizaji, ubaguzi wa tabaka, ubaguzi wa rangi, utumwa, chuki dhidi ya wanawake, ubabe, au vurugu. Muktadha si kisingizio cha moja kwa moja.

entries.source: - End with three meaningful actions plus one option to pause for historian context.
entries.value: - Malizia na vitendo vitatu vyenye maana pamoja na chaguo moja la kusitisha kwa ajili ya muktadha wa mwanahistoria.

entries.source: - If any destination field is AI-resolved or vague, first offer three concrete historically meaningful arrival options and wait for the learner to choose.
entries.value: - Ikiwa uwanja wowote wa mwishilio haujabainishwa na AI au hauko wazi, kwanza toa chaguzi tatu madhubuti za kuwasili zenye maana ya kihistoria na usubiri mwanafunzi achague.

entries.source: - Maintain two layers after the encounter begins: in-character voice bounded by the time slice, and historian sidecar notes that distinguish documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, and fictionalized dialogue.
entries.value: - Dumisha tabaka mbili baada ya kukutana kuanza: sauti ya mhusika iliyofungwa na kipindi cha muda, na maelezo ya pembeni ya mwanahistoria yanayotofautisha ukweli uliothibitishwa, ujenzi unaowezekana, tafsiri zenye utata, ufafanuzi wa kisasa, na mazungumzo ya kubuni.

entries.source: - Mark known facts, plausible reconstruction, and speculation clearly.
entries.value: - Alama ukweli unaojulikana, ujenzi unaowezekana, na uvumi kwa uwazi.

entries.source: - Otherwise, greet the traveler, summarize the passport in one compact paragraph, then ask the first meaningful action question.
entries.value: - Vinginevyo, msalimie msafiri, muhtasari wa pasipoti katika aya moja fupi, kisha uliza swali la kwanza la hatua yenye maana.

entries.source: - The historical person may resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, reject false premises, or reveal period constraints. They should not be infinitely agreeable.
entries.value: - Mtu wa kihistoria anaweza kupinga, kutoa changamoto, kukwepa, kuuliza maswali, kukataa hoja za uongo, au kufichua vikwazo vya kipindi hicho. Hawapaswi kukubaliana kila wakati.

entries.source: 1. If discovery or time-slice choice is needed, show choices and stop.
entries.value: 1. Ikiwa ugunduzi au chaguo la kipindi cha muda linahitajika, onyesha chaguzi na usimame.

entries.source: 2. Otherwise show the dossier wall first, then invite me to begin with one of the recommended questions.
entries.value: 2. Vinginevyo onyesha ukuta wa faili kwanza, kisha unialike kuanza na mojawapo ya maswali yaliyopendekezwa.

entries.source: A bad name can confuse, but the clue points to timing. First prove whether the data has arrived.
entries.value: Jina baya linaweza kuchanganya, lakini kidokezo kinaelekeza kwenye muda. Kwanza thibitisha kama data imewasili.

entries.source: A few facts, a rough draft, where you are stuck...
entries.value: Mambo machache, rasimu ya awali, mahali ulipokwama...

entries.source: A final transfer task proves improvement better than a Next button.
entries.value: Kazi ya mwisho ya uhamisho inathibitisha uboreshaji vizuri zaidi kuliko kitufe cha Inayofuata.
Mawazo ya faragha ya mtazamaji aliyetajwa

entries.source: A paragraph that lists facts without a claim makes the reader do the argument work.
entries.value: Aya inayoorodhesha ukweli bila madai humfanya msomaji afanye kazi ya kubishana.

entries.source: A price change alone is movement along a curve, not automatically a shift of the whole curve.
entries.value: Mabadiliko ya bei pekee ni harakati kando ya mkondo, si mabadiliko ya kiotomatiki ya mkondo mzima.

entries.source: A shared goal, next actions, and what is already done.
entries.value: Lengo la pamoja, hatua zinazofuata, na yale ambayo tayari yamefanyika.

entries.source: A simulation makes the hidden causal chain visible. Change one thing at a time.
entries.value: Uigaji hufanya mnyororo wa kisababishi uliofichika kuonekana. Badilisha kitu kimoja kwa wakati mmoja.

entries.source: A single check question before moving forward.
entries.value: Swali moja la ukaguzi kabla ya kusonga mbele.
Mpango wa faragha wa mfanyabiashara mmoja

entries.source: A strategy framework is a pressure test. Porter's Five Forces asks who can take profit away and how strong each pressure is.
entries.value: Mfumo wa mkakati ni jaribio la shinikizo. Nguvu Tano za Porter huuliza nani anaweza kuchukua faida na jinsi kila shinikizo lilivyo na nguvu.

entries.source: A strong paragraph names the claim, proves it with evidence, then explains why the evidence changes the reader's view.
entries.value: Aya yenye nguvu hutaja madai, kuyathibitisha kwa ushahidi, kisha kueleza kwa nini ushahidi huo unabadilisha mtazamo wa msomaji.

entries.source: A useful model is a chain: assumptions drive operations, operations create cash flow, and cash flow becomes value only after timing and risk are considered.
entries.value: Mfumo muhimu ni mnyororo: dhana huendesha shughuli, shughuli hutengeneza mtiririko wa fedha, na mtiririko wa fedha huwa thamani tu baada ya muda na hatari kuzingatiwa.

entries.source: Accept, edit, or reject the next AI pass
entries.value: Kubali, hariri, au kataa hatua inayofuata ya AI

entries.source: Accept, revise, reject, or gather evidence.
entries.value: Kubali, rekebisha, kataa, au kusanya ushahidi.

entries.source: Account tokens and a modest coin pouch
entries.value: Tokeni za akaunti na pochi ndogo ya sarafu

entries.source: Ada Lovelace, Cleopatra, B. R. Ambedkar...
entries.value: Ada Lovelace, Cleopatra, B. R. Ambedkar...

entries.source: Add, edit, challenge, or decide the next move
entries.value: Ongeza, hariri, changamoto, au amua hatua inayofuata

entries.source: Adding more information when the real gap is the link between evidence and claim.
entries.value: Kuongeza taarifa zaidi wakati pengo halisi ni kiungo kati ya ushahidi na madai.

entries.source: Agora during the days around Socrates' trial
entries.value: Agora wakati wa siku za kesi ya Socrates
Masafa ya tarehe yaliyotatuliwa na AI

entries.source: Akbar ruled the Mughal Empire in this period
entries.value: Akbar alitawala Dola ya Mughal katika kipindi hiki

entries.source: Akbar's Mughal court is experimenting with sovereignty, translation, religion, and imperial administration.
entries.value: Mahakama ya Mughal ya Akbar inafanya majaribio kuhusu mamlaka, tafsiri, dini, na utawala wa kifalme.

entries.source: All app text and tutoring replies follow this setting.
entries.value: Maandishi yote ya programu na majibu ya mafunzo hufuata mpangilio huu.

entries.source: Answer this question before moving on.
entries.value: Jibu swali hili kabla ya kuendelea.

entries.source: Apply the idea to a new situation without being carried.
entries.value: Tumia wazo hilo katika hali mpya bila kupotoshwa.

entries.source: Arabic and Sanskrit in scholarly contexts
entries.value: Kiarabu na Sanskrit katika miktadha ya kitaaluma

entries.source: Argument paragraph = claim + evidence + reasoning + consequence.
entries.value: Aya ya hoja = madai + ushahidi + hoja + matokeo.

entries.source: Arrival date, role, norms, and what knowledge belongs in that period.
entries.value: Tarehe ya kuwasili, jukumu, kanuni, na ni maarifa gani yanayohusika katika kipindi hicho.

entries.source: Arrive near a turning point and track what people know then.
entries.value: Fika karibu na hatua muhimu na ufuatilie kile ambacho watu wanajua wakati huo.

entries.source: Ask a metic what citizenship excludes
entries.value: Muulize mgeni (metic) kile ambacho uraia haukijumuishi

entries.source: Ask a water carrier what locals know
entries.value: Muulize mbeba maji kile ambacho wenyeji wanajua
Omba maelezo ya moja kwa moja

entries.source: Ask for a hint or example
Ask for advice through their period worldview and constraints.
entries.value: Omba ushauri kupitia mtazamo wao wa ulimwengu na vikwazo vya kipindi hicho.

entries.source: Ask for hints, examples, or checks before a final answer.
entries.value: Omba vidokezo, mifano, au uhakiki kabla ya jibu la mwisho.

entries.source: Ask for the next hint level
Ask for the same question in simpler words
entries.value: Omba swali lilelile kwa maneno rahisi zaidi
Uliza jinsi hali ya uhuru inavyofanya kazi

entries.source: Ask me for my current hypothesis first.
entries.value: Niulize nadharia yangu ya sasa kwanza.

entries.source: Ask one question at a time, track assumptions and evidence, offer hints on request, and do not synthesize until I have tried.
entries.value: Uliza swali moja kwa wakati mmoja, fuatilia dhana na ushahidi, toa vidokezo ukihitajika, na usitoe muhtasari hadi nitakapojaribu.

entries.source: Ask the guide to explain the power structure
entries.value: Mwombe mwongozo aeleze muundo wa madaraka

entries.source: Ask the historian to propose time slices
entries.value: Mwombe mwanahistoria apendekeze vipindi vya muda

entries.source: Ask the watchman what orders exist
entries.value: Mwulize mlinzi ni maagizo gani yaliyopo

entries.source: Ask to save major claims and classify their evidence strength.
entries.value: Omba kuhifadhi madai makuu na kuainisha nguvu ya ushahidi wake.

entries.source: Ask, act, pause for context, or request a debrief...
entries.value: Uliza, tenda, sitisha kwa muktadha, au omba maelezo...

entries.source: Ask, challenge, request evidence, or open a dossier item...
entries.value: Uliza, changamoto, omba ushahidi, au fungua kipengee cha faili...

entries.source: Assistant to a trading household or workshop
entries.value: Msaidizi wa kaya ya kibiashara au warsha

entries.source: Assumptions will appear as they surface.

entries.value: Katika kilele cha ushawishi au mamlaka

entries.source: Attack the most fragile assumption first.
Attractiveness rises when customers, suppliers, rivals, entrants, and substitutes have limited power.
entries.value: Uvutio huongezeka wakati wateja, wasambazaji, washindani, wanaoanza, na mbadala wana nguvu ndogo.

entries.source: Baghdad during the House of Wisdom
entries.value: Baghdad wakati wa Nyumba ya Hekima

entries.source: Bahadur Shah Zafar became a symbolic focus
entries.value: Bahadur Shah Zafar alikuwa kitovu cha ishara
Piga bei kwa ajili ya resini

entries.source: Begin with a persona card, then answer in character with brief context notes and suggested follow-up questions.
entries.value: Anza na kadi ya mtu, kisha jibu kama mhusika huyo ukiwa na maelezo mafupi ya muktadha na maswali ya kufuatilia yaliyopendekezwa.
Mwanzilishi, maandalizi ya mtihani, wa juu, umri wa miaka 12...

entries.source: Best for money, logistics, food, routes, and social exchange.
entries.value: Bora kwa pesa, vifaa, chakula, njia, na kubadilishana kijamii.

entries.source: Best for politics, institutions, evidence, and elite-adjacent spaces.
entries.value: Bora kwa siasa, taasisi, ushahidi, na nafasi za karibu na wasomi.

entries.source: Break the work into tasks, track blockers, keep the decision log current, and push toward a concrete output.
entries.value: Gawa kazi katika sehemu ndogo, fuatilia vikwazo, weka kumbukumbu ya maamuzi ikiwa ya sasa, na usukume kuelekea matokeo madhubuti.

entries.source: Bug fix loop = reproduce, isolate, hypothesize, test one change, verify.
entries.value: Mzunguko wa kurekebisha hitilafu = kuzalisha upya, kutenga, kubuni nadharia, kujaribu mabadiliko moja, kuthibitisha.

entries.source: Build a lesson that reacts to you.

entries.value: Jenga wazo la mradi wa sayansi
jenga kielelezo cha kiakili kinachoweza kutumika

entries.source: Build an essay outline on climate adaptation
entries.value: Jenga muhtasari wa insha kuhusu kukabiliana na mabadiliko ya tabianchi

entries.source: Build momentum, make a useful first pass, and ask for decisions without overpraising.
entries.value: Jenga kasi, fanya jaribio la kwanza lenye manufaa, na uombe maamuzi bila kusifu kupita kiasi.

entries.source: Build the lesson around what you want to become able to do.
entries.value: Jenga somo kulingana na kile unachotaka kuwa na uwezo wa kukifanya.
Jenga maelezo ya lugha rahisi pamoja.

entries.source: Build understanding by answering one precise question at a time.
entries.value: Jenga uelewa kwa kujibu swali moja sahihi kwa wakati mmoja.

entries.source: Buyer tastes are only one driver. Costs, technology, taxes, and input prices can move supply.
entries.value: Matakwa ya mnunuzi ni kichocheo kimoja tu. Gharama, teknolojia, kodi, na bei za pembejeo zinaweza kuathiri usambazaji.
Chumba cha baraza wakati wa vita Uingereza

entries.source: Calling every price movement a demand shift.
entries.value: Kuita kila mabadiliko ya bei kuwa mabadiliko ya mahitaji.

entries.source: Center of power, street-level life, and the edge of the system reveal different histories.
entries.value: Kituo cha nguvu, maisha ya mitaani, na ukingo wa mfumo hufichua historia tofauti.

entries.source: Challenge ideas while the person defends the worldview of their moment.
entries.value: Mpe changamoto mawazo wakati mtu huyo akitetea mtazamo wa ulimwengu wa wakati wake.

entries.source: Challenge my last answer with one counterexample, boundary case, or hidden assumption. Ask only one question.
entries.value: Mpe changamoto jibu langu la mwisho kwa mfano mmoja wa kukanusha, kisa cha mpakani, au dhana iliyofichika. Uliza swali moja tu.

entries.source: Challenge the tension between fighting tyranny in Europe and defending empire.
entries.value: Mpe changamoto mvutano kati ya kupambana na udhalimu barani Ulaya na kutetea himaya.

entries.source: Challenge the weakest part of the current artifact. Be direct, name the assumption, and ask me to defend or revise it.
entries.value: Mpe changamoto sehemu dhaifu zaidi ya kazi ya sasa. Kuwa mnyoofu, taja dhana hiyo, na uniombe kuitetea au kuirekebisha.

entries.source: Challenge weak assumptions, vague claims, and missing evidence while keeping the user as decision owner.
entries.value: Mpe changamoto dhana dhaifu, madai yasiyo wazi, na ushahidi unaokosekana huku ukimwacha mtumiaji kama mmiliki wa uamuzi.
Chang'an ilikuwa mji mkuu wa Tang

entries.source: Change inputs and explain the output.
Changes syntax before checking execution order.
entries.value: Badilisha sintaksia kabla ya kuangalia mpangilio wa utekelezaji.

entries.source: Changing several files at once may hide the actual cause even if the symptom disappears.
entries.value: Kubadilisha faili kadhaa kwa mara moja kunaweza kuficha sababu halisi hata kama dalili itatoweka.

entries.source: Check whether the async result is awaited before reading it.
entries.value: Angalia ikiwa matokeo ya async yanasubiriwa kabla ya kuyasoma.

entries.source: Choose a concept and starting level. Your tutor teaches a small piece, checks it, then adjusts after every reply.
entries.value: Chagua dhana na kiwango cha kuanzia. Mkufunzi wako anafundisha sehemu ndogo, anaiangalia, kisha anarekebisha baada ya kila jibu.

entries.source: Choose the relationship and the purpose of the room.
entries.value: Chagua uhusiano na madhumuni ya chumba.
Chagua mahali imara zaidi pa kuingilia.
raia-mwendesha mashtaka anayejaribu dhana za kifalme

entries.source: Citizens weigh piety, education, and loyalty
entries.value: Raia wanapima uchamungu, elimu, na uaminifu

entries.source: Classifies actors before reading the behavior.
entries.value: Huainisha waigizaji kabla ya kusoma tabia.

entries.source: Close, but one link is missing
Collect examples, facts, quotes, or constraints that support the work.
entries.value: Kusanya mifano, ukweli, nukuu, au vikwazo vinavyounga mkono kazi hiyo.

entries.source: Compare intentions, contemporary criticism, later consequences, and modern judgement without reducing the person to hero or villain.
entries.value: Linganisha nia, ukosoaji wa kisasa, matokeo ya baadaye, na hukumu ya kisasa bila kumfanya mtu kuwa shujaa au mwovu.
Linganisha taarifa za waasi na Kampuni

entries.source: Compress the idea into one usable mental model.
entries.value: Fupisha wazo hilo kuwa mtindo mmoja wa kiakili unaoweza kutumika.

entries.source: Concision helps only after the argument works. Length is not the main diagnosis here.
entries.value: Ufupi husaidia tu baada ya hoja kufanya kazi. Urefu si utambuzi mkuu hapa.

entries.source: Confront contradictions, evasions, and consequences with evidence support.
entries.value: Kabiliana na utata, ukwepaji, na matokeo kwa usaidizi wa ushahidi.

entries.source: Confuses movement along demand with a demand shift.
entries.value: Inachanganya harakati kando ya mahitaji na mabadiliko ya mahitaji.

entries.source: Confusing accounting profit with cash that can actually be distributed or reinvested.
entries.value: Kuchanganya faida ya uhasibu na pesa taslimu ambazo zinaweza kusambazwa au kuwekezwa tena.

entries.source: connect assumptions, cash flow, and valuation
entries.value: unganisha dhana, mtiririko wa fedha, na uthamini

entries.source: Conservative local outer layers chosen by the guide
entries.value: Tabaka za nje za kienyeji zilizochaguliwa na mwongozo
